questions.prompt: Am I choosing the implementation with less mechanism among the options that satisfy the same contract?
Will the correct path be easier than any shortcut on the authoritative surfaces touched by this task?
Can this ship without routine babysitting operator tending or hidden upkeep burden?
Will the governing behavior be enforced mechanically on authoritative surfaces rather than merely documented?
If I am treating any part of this work as foundational is it actually inside the closed foundation set and if not is the work deferred until forced?
Will this leave exactly one valid path for the concern or a migration path with explicit end state and deadline?
Have I avoided unnecessary knobs options and abstractions while keeping legitimate environment variance in env vars only?
Am I using the most proven operable and well understood technology that satisfies the contract?
